godTaskAnalysis.reasoning: This task has multiple phases: first explore the project to understand current UI, then discuss and propose the most important UI improvement, then implement it. It requires exploration, discussion, and coding.

phases.name: Explore Project UI
phases.description: Explore the project structure, understand what the app does, review current UI components and user experience patterns to identify improvement opportunities

phases.name: Propose and Discuss
phases.description: Propose the single most impactful UI improvement for user experience, present reasoning, and get user confirmation

phases.name: Implement UI Change
phases.description: Implement the agreed-upon UI improvement with proper testing and verification

terminationCriteria: Project UI has been explored and understood
1 most important UI improvement has been proposed and discussed with user
User has confirmed/agreed on the improvement
The UI change has been implemented
The change has been verified to work correctly
